beforeFindings.logo: Public lockup displayed split DAE KWANG / TECH rhythm and mobile app label could clip on narrow real-device view.
beforeFindings.process: Mobile process route spent the first screen on oversized hero plus feature rail, and process section rhythm felt generic. Desktop process had a 6-step card grid with uneven final row.
beforeFindings.quality: Quality route lower metric strip looked like an unfinished/certification panel and connected weakly to footer. Mobile showed cramped lower content under fixed bottom dock.

fixSummary.logo: Normalized brand lockup text to DAEKWANG TECH, tightened wordmark spacing, and constrained mobile header logo sizing.
fixSummary.quality: Replaced the quality lower metric/certification strip with a premium quality checkpoint panel using manufacturing inspection steps.
fixSummary.process: Expanded process detail into a practical 7-step manufacturing flow and removed mobile feature rail on process/quality subroutes to reduce first-screen clutter.

remainingHold: Chrome headless emitted environment-level USB/webapp messages unrelated to app console
